title: Duplicate Phase 2 comment header in contact_set
description: The contact_set update loop has the banner '// ── Phase 2 (writes, only if Phase 1 passed)' twice in a row — once before the empty-ops branch (which continues) and again before the actual write branch. A reader scanning down assumes the second banner marks a new section; instead it marks the same section as the first. Rewrite: label the empty-ops branch '// Phase 2a: empty patch — existence check only' and the write branch '// Phase 2b: apply ops atomically', or just remove the second banner and keep the explanatory comment on the write path.
close_reason: Fixed in code; decision records documented
